entity.summary: United States-origin centralized cryptocurrency exchange founded on July 28, 2011 and continuing as an active global trading platform.
entity.notes: Official founding material gives an exact July 28, 2011 date. Current official and independent profiles confirm continuing operation.

expected.summary: United States-based centralized exchange launched in 2011 and still operating under the Kraken brand.
expected.notes: Launch date updated from Kraken’s official founding post dated 2011-07-28.

changes.summary: United States-origin centralized cryptocurrency exchange founded on July 28, 2011 and continuing as an active global trading platform.
changes.notes: Official founding material gives an exact July 28, 2011 date. Current official and independent profiles confirm continuing operation.

events.title: Kraken was founded
events.description: Kraken traces its founding to 2011-07-28, when the exchange project began under the Kraken name.
events.notes: The event uses Kraken's official founding date already stored in the canonical entity.

events.title: Kraken ended U.S. on-chain staking after an SEC settlement
events.description: Kraken agreed to end its on-chain staking service for U.S. clients and pay $30 million in disgorgement, prejudgment interest, and civil penalties to settle SEC charges.
events.notes: The settlement affected U.S. staking services, not Kraken's overall exchange operations.

evidence.title: Kraken is Born
evidence.notes: Primary project history source identifying 2011-07-28 as Kraken's founding date.

evidence.title: 13 Years Ago: The Kraken Emerged
evidence.notes: Official retrospective corroborating Kraken's 2011 origin and continuing exchange identity.

evidence.title: CoinGecko exchange reference for Kraken
evidence.notes: Independent exchange profile corroborates the Kraken identity, United States origin, and current market activity.

evidence.title: Kraken to end on-chain staking services for U.S. clients
evidence.notes: Kraken's official notice confirms the settlement and termination of on-chain staking for U.S. clients.

evidence.title: Kraken to Discontinue Unregistered Offer and Sale of Crypto Asset Staking-As-A-Service Program and Pay $30 Million to Settle SEC Charges
evidence.notes: Primary regulatory notice states the settlement terms and $30 million monetary relief.
